name: update_preference
description: Update a single travel preference field. Emitted each time the agent confirms a preference from the user's speech.

name: recommendations_ready
description: Agent has collected minimum required preferences (origin, destination, date, travelers). Signals UI to enable the confirm button.

name: preferences_complete
description: User has confirmed all preferences and is ready to search. Signals handoff to booking flow.

name: recommendations_invalidated
description: A preference changed after recommendations were ready. Previous state is stale.

name: clear_preferences
description: User wants to start over from scratch. Reset all collected preferences.
